name: Snickers Candy Bar Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cut-up Snickers bars, water, and peanut butter in the top of a double boiler. Heat and stir until well melted and blended. Cool.
2. Mix together the flour, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, cream the butter thoroughly. Gradually add sugar and beat until fluffy. Beat in the egg yolks and vanilla.
4. Beat in the cooled candy bar mix, mixing until smooth. Add 1/4 cup buttermilk and stir in the flour mixture alternately with the remaining 1 cup buttermilk; mix only until blended.
5. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites. Divide batter evenly between 2 greased and floured 9-inch square pans.
6. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 45-55 minutes. Cool in pans on a rack for 5 minutes, then turn out and finish cooling on a rack.
7. Serve with sweetened whipped cream.
